$schema_note: Edit this file to add sections, pages, or tasks. Re-run 'python3 docs/generate-sitemap.py' to regenerate the Excel. Status edits made in Excel are not synced back to this file, so treat the Excel as the live working tracker once it exists.

pages.label: Home

pages.label: Quiz overview
pages.description: The quiz is a single page that walks the customer through 31 questions one at a time. Each question below shares the same URL but is tracked separately so we can polish each step.

tasks.name: Quiz framework working end to end
Each question reachable by a step number in the URL
tasks.notes: Refactoring quiz from single-page screen state to per-route pages (/quiz/q/[id]). Designers can deep-link any question.

tasks.name: Save partial answers if customer drops off
Polish quiz typography across all questions
tasks.notes: Headings and body text feel too small or mono on some steps

tasks.name: Mobile usability check on every question

pages.label: Cart
pages.description: The customer's bag and where they pick their subscription plan

tasks.name: Three subscription plan cards side by side

Reassurance copy inside each plan card
Trust strip under the checkout button
Card colours follow the palette
Empty cart screen invites them to start the quiz
Stacks to one column on mobile
Routine summary panel with name, skin type, concerns, fragrance
Numbered routine steps (Cleanser → Serum → Moisturizer)
Per-item 'Selected for {concerns}' microcopy from the matching engine

Per-plan inline price with savings chip and strikethrough anchor
Ship-to country selector with grouped region dropdown
Multi-currency pricing (EUR / GBP / USD) repriced live on country change
'Edit responses' link returns to results to adjust the formula

tasks.name: Verify the Stripe session and confirm the order

Cancel an order or delete a test order

Close the daily manifest and schedule a pickup

pages.label: Barcode Studio

tasks.name: Manage which company prefix we issue from

pages.label: Stripe (payments)

tasks.name: Send the customer to Stripe to pay
Automatically create the order when Stripe confirms payment
Subscription billing (bi-monthly and annual)
Plan for what happens when a recurring charge fails

Enable country-specific payment methods in Stripe Dashboard (iDEAL, Bancontact, SEPA, BACS, ACH, Apple/Google Pay, Klarna, Link)
tasks.notes: Code path is ready — Stripe auto-displays methods when payment_method_types is omitted. Just needs dashboard enablement.

tasks.name: Stripe Customer Portal for saved payment methods + invoices + subscription pause

tasks.name: Save stripe_customer_id from checkout.session.completed webhook

tasks.name: Products and ingredients data set up

Admin role check so only the right people can use the dashboard
Public product image storage (the bucket called products)
Upload one real product photo per barcode

pages.label: INCI Beauty (product import)
pages.description: External cosmetic ingredient database where our products get listed

tasks.name: Generate the XML file from each product
Download button inside the fulfillment dashboard
Placeholder image hosted publicly
Use a different image per product
Try a real import on INCI Beauty and confirm it works
tasks.notes: First two imports rejected — invalid INCI ingredient names, wrong <info> usage, image mismatch. INCI Beauty deployed a fix for the image-ignored bug on their side. Test XML drafted for BOV to re-test the upload pipeline.

tasks.name: Fix <info> field — emit self-closing instead of stuffing net_content
Per-product images served from /products/{gtin}.jpg with placeholder fallback
ingredients.inci_name column + COSING-validated names for every ingredient
tasks.notes: Blocker for INCI Beauty acceptance — current ingredient names ('pH adjuster', 'Emulgade 1000 NI') are functional descriptors, not INCI.

tasks.name: Update GS1 Verified portal entry for each GTIN we submit
tasks.notes: Operational — not technical. Ensures GS1 registry matches what we ship to INCI.

pages.label: Direx Courier (Bulgarian shipping)
pages.description: The courier that picks up parcels from our warehouse and delivers them

tasks.name: Get our login working with their system
Register the warehouse as a sender on their portal
Confirm whether we ship Bulgaria only, or international too
Add a Create Shipment button per order with label download
Close manifest and schedule pickup actions
Automatic tracking updates every 6 hours
Customer can see tracking from their account
Shipped email with tracking link

pages.label: Design Lab (open with ?lab=1)

tasks.name: Five font slots (headlines, inner pages, body, inner body, captions and buttons)
Roughly 70 fonts to choose from
Picker mode: click any text to see what controls it
Per element override panel with bold, italic, underline, colour
Six built-in design directions plus your own saved ones
Six brand inspired directions (Aesop, Le Labo, Glossier, etc.)
Seven built-in palettes plus your own hex picker
Card corner style picker
Modular palette: card surface, button background and text, borders, accents
Each section can collapse or expand
Sitemap tab inside the panel (still there for quick navigation)
